'''sovawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leafmining|leafmining]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leafmining|leafmining]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sovawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovawithi|sovawithi]] || [[word:sovawiji|sovawiji]] || [[word:sovawishi|sovawishi]] || [[word:sovawiki|sovawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovawuthuthu|sovawuthuthu]] || [[word:sovawujuju|sovawujuju]] || [[word:sovawushushu|sovawushushu]] || [[word:sovawukuku|sovawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovawuthu|sovawuthu]] || [[word:sovawuju|sovawuju]] || [[word:sovawushu|sovawushu]] || [[word:sovawuku|sovawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovawufthuf|sovawufthuf]] || [[word:sovawufjuf|sovawufjuf]] || [[word:sovawufshuf|sovawufshuf]] || [[word:sovawufkuf|sovawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovawethe|sovawethe]] || [[word:sovaweje|sovaweje]] || [[word:sovaweshe|sovaweshe]] || [[word:sovaweke|sovaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovawothotho|sovawothotho]] || [[word:sovawojojo|sovawojojo]] || [[word:sovawoshosho|sovawoshosho]] || [[word:sovawokoko|sovawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovawotho|sovawotho]] || [[word:sovawojo|sovawojo]] || [[word:sovawosho|sovawosho]] || [[word:sovawoko|sovawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovawofthof|sovawofthof]] || [[word:sovawofjof|sovawofjof]] || [[word:sovawofshof|sovawofshof]] || [[word:sovawofkof|sovawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfthÃŸf|sovawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfjÃŸf|sovawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfshÃŸf|sovawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfkÃŸf|sovawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|sovawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|sovawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|sovawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|sovawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfthÃŸf|sovawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfjÃŸf|sovawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfshÃŸf|sovawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfkÃŸf|sovawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfthÃŸf|sovawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfjÃŸf|sovawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfshÃŸf|sovawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:sovawÃŸfkÃŸf|sovawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovawÃḊthÃḊ|sovawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:sovawÃḊjÃḊ|sovawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:sovawÃḊshÃḊ|sovawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:sovawÃḊkÃḊ|sovawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovawathatha|sovawathatha]] || [[word:sovawajaja|sovawajaja]] || [[word:sovawashasha|sovawashasha]] || [[word:sovawakaka|sovawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovawatha|sovawatha]] || [[word:sovawaja|sovawaja]] || [[word:sovawasha|sovawasha]] || [[word:sovawaka|sovawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovawafthaf|sovawafthaf]] || [[word:sovawafjaf|sovawafjaf]] || [[word:sovawafshaf|sovawafshaf]] || [[word:sovawafkaf|sovawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sovawasha|sovawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sovawshÃḋsha|sovawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sovawrosha|sovawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sovawmusha|sovawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sovawyasha|sovawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosovawnkshÃḋsha|gosovawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosovawnkrosha|gosovawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosovawnkmusha|gosovawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosovawnkyasha|gosovawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sovavawasha|sovavawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sovavawshÃḋsha|sovavawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sovavawrosha|sovavawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sovavawmusha|sovavawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sovavawyasha|sovavawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosovavawnkshÃḋsha|gosovavawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosovavawnkrosha|gosovavawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosovavawnkmusha|gosovavawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosovavawnkyasha|gosovavawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sevÃḊwasha|sevÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sevÃḊwshÃḋsha|sevÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sevÃḊwrosha|sevÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sevÃḊwmusha|sevÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sevÃḊwyasha|sevÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosevÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gosevÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosevÃḊwnkrosha|gosevÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosevÃḊwnkmusha|gosevÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosevÃḊwnkyasha|gosevÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sovfawasha|sovfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sovfawshÃḋsha|sovfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sovfawrosha|sovfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sovfawmusha|sovfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sovfawyasha|sovfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosovfawnkshÃḋsha|gosovfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosovfawnkrosha|gosovfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosovfawnkmusha|gosovfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosovfawnkyasha|gosovfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
